message.content:
@startuml
class Account {
    + userdatal1 : Object
    + admindataII : Object
}

Account <|-- User
User --> TicketSystem
TicketSystem "0..*" -- Order
Order ..> Bookingticket <<interface>>
Bookingticket .|> Returnticket <<abstract class>>
Returnticket <|.. Changbooking <<enumeration>>
Changbooking -left-> Getplace <<annotation>>
Getplace -> getnumber() 
getnumber() <-* getdate() *--> getPrice() 

note right of getName(): This method retrieves name\nfrom object instance.\nIt's used in multiple places.


@enduml
